creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 235869
Patch for webp

Update (lib)webp to 1.2.2 and switch to CMake for faster builds and .cmake files for other projects

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n251817-0c4d13c521a (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE (aarch64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)

Import following patches from Fedora:
https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/libwebp/blob/rawhide/f/libwebp-cmakedir.patch
https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/libwebp/blob/rawhide/f/libwebp-freeglut.patch

Tested with following dependencies (Poudriere bulk, 12.3-RELEASE (amd64):

devel/allegro5 (fails due to pandoc issues)
devel/cvsgraph
devel/efl
devel/smooth
